items.title: Four years into its full-scale war in Ukraine, Russia is feeling the effects
items.dek: Steve Rosenberg reports on the economic consequences of Russia's war, and how people are coping.

items.title: Violence erupts in Mexico after drug lord El Mencho killed
items.dek: The death of the most-wanted Jalisco cartel chief sparks retaliatory violence in at least a dozen states in Mexico.
items.body: The death of the most-wanted Jalisco cartel chief sparks retaliatory violence in at least a dozen states in Mexico.
